Question: Solve: $$\frac{9}{25} = - \frac{4}{5} z .$$

(9/25) · (–5/4) = z  

Compute the product:

9·(–5) / (25·4) = –45 / 100 = –9 / 20

z = –9/20   (≈ –0.45).
